question: How many hours have I spent on my abstract ocean sculpture?

retrieval_results.context:
User has spent 10-12 hours on an abstract ocean sculpture, which is still in progress.
User plans to incorporate seashells and driftwood into the abstract ocean sculpture
User is creating a sculpture inspired by the sunset.
User plans to incorporate found ocean objects into next sculpture
User plans to incorporate sea glass into the next sculpture
User uses ceramic adhesive or a clay‑water mixture to attach driftwood to the sculpture
User plans to incorporate beach stones into the next sculpture
User plans to use layering and impasto techniques to capture movement in the sunset sculpture.
User plans to add texture to sunset sculpture using fabric and clay
User explains that the pattern and texture of the fabric influence the final appearance of the sculpture.
